description: A smart torque wrench used for a critical safety component (installing lug nuts) is due for its mandatory recalibration.

nodes.task_description: The tool management system sends an alert that the wrench is due for calibration.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the alert for the specific tool.

nodes.task_description: The agent takes the tool out of service and provides the assembly worker with a calibrated replacement.

expected_outcome.value: The tools are swapped to ensure no uncalibrated tool is used.

nodes.task_description: The agent sends the out-of-service tool to the calibration lab.

expected_outcome.value: The tool is sent for recalibration.
